raw_consumer_statement:
My XXXX XXXX and Citibank credit card information was given to merchant XXXX XXXX online but after a month my Financial information was jeopardized so I closed my bank account and froze my Citibank credit card. In spite of which merchant was allowed to charge Citibank credit card. So I complained and eventually canceled my card. 

However now I'm receiving collection agency letters representing Citibank attempting to collect. I'm being harassed and since I disputed ALL the charges and fees as unauthorized and therefore UNACCEPTABLE. 

Can you please help?
